item.title: Simplify backlog history to basic listing
item.intent: backlog history is a simple dump of the archive, not a query engine. The --since, --failed, and --limit filter flags are removed. The function shrinks from 84 to ~20 lines.
item.description: cmd_backlog_history is 84 lines with --since, --failed, --limit flags and a title lookup map. This is overengineered for viewing an append-only JSONL file. Replace with a simple jq format and tail. Users who need filtering can pipe through jq directly.
steps: Replace cmd_backlog_history with simple: read sprints.jsonl, format with jq, print last 20
Keep the formatted table output (ID, date, status, duration, title)
Update help text to remove filter flags
acceptanceCriteria: backlog history shows formatted table of recent sprint history
